name: Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited
summary: Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited researches, develops, manufactures, and sells various baby apparel and supplies in Taiwan and internationally. It operates through General Merchandise Retailing and Restaurant Entertainment segments. The company offers children's clothing, and baby and children's products, including maternity products, breastfeeding supplies, weaning products, cleaning and care products, cotton-fiber products, inner wear, etc. under the Piyopiyo, Abby Bear, and Kaeru brand names. It also provides catering services; franchises Piyo CASA family restaurant; and leases plant. Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
